---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(randomForest)
library(SDMtune)
library(here)
```

```{r}
model_mig <- readRDS(here("methods", "Penn_migration_model", "model_migratory.rds"))

model_res <- readRDS(here("methods", "Penn_residential_model", "model_residential.rds"))
```

Calculating permutation importance: "returns the average and the standard deviation of the permutation importances of the single models"

normalized to % decrease in training AUC (higher is more important)

Default is 10 permutations
```{r}
vi_mig <- varImp(model_mig)
vi_res <- varImp(model_res)
```

Combine into a single dataframe
```{r}
vi_mig$model <- "Migratory"
vi_res$model <- "Breeding"

vi <- bind_rows(vi_mig,vi_res) %>% 
  filter()
```

Let's figure out how to plot it
```{r}
ggplot(vi, aes(x ))
```
